description: Drift detection between the frontend (frontend/src/constants/question-of-the-day.ts getTodaysQuestion) and backend (backend/src/main/java/com/worshiproom/post/QotdService) QOTD rotation logic. Both implementations must agree on the modulo-72 path: dayOfYear % 72 -> POOL[index]. Liturgical-season-aware rotation is deferred to Phase 9.2; consumer tests MUST mock or bypass the seasonal branch so all dates exercise the modulo path. See _specs/forums/spec-3-9.md D1 + Test Specifications. Consumed by backend/src/test/java/com/worshiproom/post/QotdDriftDetectionTest.java and frontend/src/constants/__tests__/qotd-drift.test.ts.
